Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's and Defendant's Counsel are each sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR# 9225. (212)

Notice Of Defts' Motion To Compel Site Inspection And Requestg For Sanctions In Form Of Reasonable Attorney Fees And Expenses
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
L. Jay Pedersen, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Dawn Daniel and Herbert Madan
Robert P. Gates, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Theodore Eden, ind/& as trustee of the Eden Family Revocable Trust

HEARING HELD. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION. Defendants Dawn Daniel and Herbert Madan's motion to compel a site inspection is granted. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to scheduling the inspection at a mutually convenient time. The inspection shall be completed by March 14. 2007. The Court finds that plaintiff made, without substantial justification, an unmeritorious objection to discovery.

MODIFICATION:
Inspection by March 14, 2007 of downstairs and roof garden. Request for monetary sanctions denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Continued To Mar-14-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-16-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-28-07 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 504
